steps.title: Identify the passage's structural pivot
steps.content: The passage presents two tribal cultural centers, then pivots with “Both centers contrast with museums that aren't Indigenous-led.” This shift moves from describing tribal centers to contrasting them with non-Indigenous institutions.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: Choice A describes this exact structural pattern: discussing two tribal centers, then comparing them with non-Indigenous institutions. The other three add unsupported details or make unsupported claims about the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
